items.text: PCP is the Personal Context Protocol: an open protocol for connecting AI systems to user-owned personal context.
PCP v0.1 uses JSON-RPC 2.0 over one HTTP endpoint with a small initialization handshake and protocol version negotiation.
Keep PCP v0.1 small and working: no OAuth, no streaming, no vector database, no LLM dependency, and no MCP SDK internals.
